hero.title: Hi, I'm Ekki Syam Sugiardi
hero.subtitle: Senior Software Engineer (QA)
hero.description: Senior Software Engineer (QA) with over 4 years of experience at Ninja Van. Recognized for technical versatility and a commitment to engineering mentorship. A tech-agnostic specialist who pivots between Go, Python, and Java to resolve critical bottlenecks across multiple product teams. Proven track record of scaling automation from the ground up, transitioning manual testers into automation roles, and collaborating on cost-reduction initiatives that contributed to over $60,000 in monthly savings.

philosophy.title: Quality Engineering
philosophy.intro: Quality isn't just about finding bugs. It's about designing systems that prevent them.
philosophy.listIntro: My approach builds on three pillars:

list.auth: Tooling over Toil: Automating repetitive tasks to empower testers to focus on exploration and strategy.
list.code: Shift Left: Catching issues during development, not after deployment.
list.adaptability: Technical Agility: Seamlessly switching contexts - Java, Go, Python - to match the team's evolving stack and business needs.
list.reliability: Force Multiplier: Stepping up during critical shortages to solve complex automation problems and keep the pipeline moving.

philosophy.conclusion: Quality is an engineering discipline. I build the tools and frameworks that enforce reliability. Whether it's a Go backend or this React platform, I write code that solves real quality problems.

milestones.title: Work Experience
milestones.subtitle: My professional journey at Ninja Van

items.title: TestingWithEkki
items.description: Started building this platform to share knowledge and bridge the gap between manual testing and engineering. A playground for modern web tech and high-quality automation patterns.

items.title: Senior Software Engineer, QA
items.description: Built an AI testing framework to verify intent classification models, automating 50% of Tier 1 support tickets. Managed automation for partnership integrations (TikTok, Lazada, Shopee). Validated features for cost-reduction initiatives saving $60,000/month. Developed tools for payload decoding and config comparison. Mentored manual testers on automation.

items.title: Software Engineer, QA
items.description: Co-developed the company's first Go-based integration testing framework, detecting defects 80% faster. Served as cross-team automation specialist. Achieved 100% test coverage for Recovery team mobile/web/API suites. Reduced manual testing effort by 70%. Maintained <1% regression error rate. Enforced strict CI/CD quality gates.

items.title: Backend Engineer Intern
items.description: Enhanced QA environment performance by developing a data cleanup service and contributed to code quality by building secure RESTful APIs.
